calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appeared for the Plaintiff(s) Capital One Bank.
Order granting ex parte request to waive live testimony of witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Noah Deguzman for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $15,611.85
Prejudgment Interest - $658.56
Attorney Fees - $1,575.00
Costs - $514.50
Total judgment in the amount of $18,359.91

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Continued To Oct-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
